title: GitLab CI Pipeline Configuration Generation
description: PHP-based CI automation that generates GitLab YAML pipeline configurations for tracer, profiler, appsec, shared components, and packaging jobs.

generators.role: Shared foundation – included by all other generators
generators.produces: YAML anchors, service definitions, default retry policy, shared PHP functions
functions: unset_dd_runner_env_vars(): emits YAML to unset DD_SERVICE, DD_ENV, DD_TAGS, etc.
windows_git_setup(): emits PowerShell workspace-cleanup + git clone + submodule init
windows_git_setup_with_packages(): wraps windows_git_setup preserving packages/ artifacts
yaml_output: .services: test-agent, request-replayer, httpbin-integration, mysql, elasticsearch2/7, zookeeper, kafka, redis, memcache, amqp, mongodb, sqlsrv, googlespanner

functions: before_script_steps($with_docker_auth): emits switch-php, git config, mkdir, mv ddtrace.so
agent_httpbin_service(): emits test-agent + request-replayer + httpbin-integration service refs
jobs_generated: compile extension: debug — matrix: all_minor_major_targets × arch_targets; runs .gitlab/compile_extension.sh
compile extension: debug-zts-asan — extends compile:debug; asan_minor_major_targets × arch_targets
windows test_c — windows-v2:2019 runner; windows_minor_major_targets; Docker-based NTS build + run-tests.php
Prepare code — PHP 8.2 CLI; runs make generate; produces src/bridge/_generated_*.php
.base_test (template) — debug build; docker image php-${PHP_MAJOR_MINOR}_bookworm-7; timeout 60m
.asan_test (template) — extends .base_test; SWITCH_PHP_VERSION=debug-zts-asan + ASAN_OPTIONS
.debug_test (template) — extends .base_test; SWITCH_PHP_VERSION=debug
ASAN test_c: [ver, arch] — per asan target × arch; make test_c
ASAN Internal api randomized tests: [ver, arch] — make test_internal_api_randomized
ASAN init hook tests: [ver] — amd64 only; make test_with_init_hook
ASAN test_c with multiple observers: [ver] — PHP 8.0+, amd64; make test_c_observer
ASAN Opcache tests: [ver] — amd64; make test_opcache
test_extension_ci: [ver] — make test_extension_ci; timeout 120m
Unit tests: [ver] — make test_unit
API unit tests: [ver] — make test_api_unit
Disabled test_c run: [ver] — make test_c_disabled
Internal api randomized tests: [ver] — make test_internal_api_randomized
Opcache tests: [ver] — make test_opcache
PHP Language Tests: [ver] — make install_all + run_php_language_tests.sh
.cli_integration_test (template) — parses Makefile TEST_INTEGRATIONS_*/TEST_WEB_* targets; SAPI matrix for web (7.2+: cli-server/cgi-fcgi/apache2handler)
Dynamic integration/web jobs: [target, ver, sapi] — conditional service injection per target name (mysql, elasticsearch, kafka, redis, mongodb, sqlsrv, etc.)
test_auto_instrumentation / test_composer / test_integration: [ver] — cli_integration_test + mongodb
test_distributed_tracing: [ver, sapi] — cli-server + cgi-fcgi variants
xDebug tests: [ver, xdebug_version] — matrix PHP 7.0–8.4 × xDebug 2.7–3.4
aggregate tested versions — master/manual; runs create_or_update_supported_versions_pr.sh via dd-octo-sts
profiling tests — matrix: profiler_targets × arch_targets × {alpine + centos-7 images}; builds NTS via switch-php + cargo build profiler-release; runs run-tests.php phpt; then repeats for ZTS
clippy NTS — amd64 only; all_profiler_targets; switch-php nts; cargo clippy all-targets all-features -D warnings
Cargo test — amd64; PHP 8.5 bookworm; switch-php nts; cargo test --all-features

helpers: $ecrLoginSnippet: AWS STS assume-role + ECR docker login for 669783387624.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
templates: .appsec_integration_tests: docker-in-docker:amd64; Gradle-based; loads/saves Docker volume caches
.docker_push_job: docker:29.4.0-noble + ECR login + dockerhub login + openjdk-17-jre
jobs_generated: test appsec extension — matrix: all_targets × arch × {debug, debug-zts, debug-zts-asan}; cmake + make xtest
appsec integration tests — Gradle targets test7.0..test8.5-release/-zts/-musl
appsec integration tests (ssi) — test8.3-release-ssi
appsec integration tests (helper-rust) — -PuseHelperRust flag; selective PHP versions
helper-rust build and test — gradlew testHelperRust
helper-rust code coverage — LLVM profraw → lcov; Codecov upload via Vault token
helper-rust integration coverage — buildHelperRustWithCoverage + test8.3-debug + generateHelperRustIntegrationCoverage
appsec code coverage — cmake -DDD_APPSEC_ENABLE_COVERAGE=ON; llvm-cov-17 → lcov; Codecov + Datadog CI upload
push appsec images — manual; gradlew pushAll; amd64+arm64
push appsec docker images multiarch — gradlew pushMultiArch; needs push appsec images
appsec lint — clang-format-17 + clang-tidy-17; make format tidy
test appsec helper asan — cmake ASAN flags; make ddappsec_helper_test
check libxml2 version — Python script checks local vs latest GNOME GitLab tag

generators.role: Shared C/Rust components pipeline (ZAI, Tea, components)
jobs_generated: C components ASAN — matrix: centos-7/alpine/bookworm-7; cmake -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=asan.cmake; make all + test
C components UBSAN — bookworm-7; cmake ubsan toolchain; make all + test (repeat until-fail:10)
Build & Test Tea — all PHP × switch_php_versions; .gitlab/build-tea.sh + make test; produces tmp/tea artifacts
Configuration Consistency — validates metadata/supported-configurations.json vs tooling/generate-supported-configurations.sh
Zend Abstract Interface Tests: [ver, switch_php_version] — per all_targets × switch_php_versions; cmake Tea_ROOT + zend_abstract_interface; make test
ZAI Shared Tests: [7.4/8.0] — shared ext images; TEA_INI_IGNORE=0
Extension Tea Tests: [ver, switch_php_version] — make install + cmake tests/tea; make test

use_cases: UC1: Generate Tracer CI Pipeline — CI Engineer invokes generate-tracer.php; generates compile + test + integration YAML for PHP tracer extension across all PHP versions and architectures
UC2: Generate Profiler CI Pipeline — generate-profiler.php produces Rust profiler test jobs for PHP 7.1+ on Alpine and CentOS-7 images
UC3: Generate AppSec CI Pipeline — generate-appsec.php produces WAF extension tests, Gradle integration tests, helper-rust coverage, Docker image publish jobs

UC4: Generate Package/Release Pipeline — generate-package.php produces full multi-stage release pipeline (prepare→release) with cross-platform packaging (.apk/.rpm/.deb/.tar.gz) and one-pipeline integration
UC5: Generate Shared Components Pipeline — generate-shared.php produces C component (ASAN/UBSAN), ZAI, and Tea framework tests
UC6: Define Shared Services — generate-common.php defines all reusable test service containers (test-agent, httpbin, databases, message queues)
UC7: Define PHP Version Matrices — generate-common.php controls which PHP versions are targeted per component (all/asan-only/profiler/windows)
UC8: Windows Build & Test — generate-tracer.php generates PowerShell-based Docker NTS build + run-tests.php job for windows-v2:2019 runners
UC9: Dynamic Integration Test Job Generation — generate-tracer.php parses Makefile TEST_INTEGRATIONS_* and TEST_WEB_* targets to emit per-target CI jobs with auto-detected service dependencies
UC10: Aggregate Tested Versions — generate-tracer.php emits job that collects tested_versions.json artifacts and creates GitHub PR via dd-octo-sts
key_relationships: generate-tracer.php parses Makefile to derive integration test job names and versions
generate-tracer.php parses generate-common.php to extract .services names for service injection
important_notes: All generators are PHP scripts that emit YAML via echo/heredoc — they are executed to produce .gitlab-ci.yml files
generate-common.php is the single source of truth for PHP version/ABI mapping and service definitions
PHP version filters: all (7.0–8.5), asan (7.4+), profiler (7.1+), windows (7.2+)
Architecture support: Linux jobs use amd64+arm64; Windows jobs amd64 only
Service bind address adapts: 0.0.0.0 locally, 127.0.0.1 on GitLab CI (Kubernetes)
Package formats per platform: Alpine→APK, GNU Linux→RPM+DEB+tar.gz, Windows→dbgsym.tar.gz
AppSec uses AWS ECR (role arn:aws:iam::669783387624:role/ddbuild-dd-trace-php-ci) for Docker images
Coverage reporting: AppSec/helper-rust use Codecov + Datadog CI; Vault for token retrieval
generate-tracer.php auto-injects services based on make target name substring matching (e.g. 'kafka' → zookeeper+kafka services)
